data.current_description: Process an image provided via URL with various editing operations including background removal, shadow effects, background replacement, and more.
data.description_suggestion: Process an image provided via URL with AI-powered editing operations. Supports background removal, shadow effects, background replacement, relighting, text removal, expand, uncrop, beautifier, flat lay, ghost mannequin, virtual model, and upscale. Requires API authentication. Returns the edited image as output. Specify desired editing operations via query parameters. Requires Plus Plan subscription.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about available operations and missing critical details. Added comprehensive list of supported editing operations, authentication requirement, return value specification, and subscription tier requirement for AI agent clarity on operation capabilities and prerequisites.

data.current_description: Process an uploaded image file with various editing operations including background removal, shadow effects, background replacement, and more.
data.description_suggestion: Process an uploaded image file with AI-powered editing operations. Supports background removal, shadow effects, background replacement, relighting, text removal, expand, uncrop, beautifier, flat lay, ghost mannequin, virtual model, and upscale. Accepts image file in request body via EditImageRequest schema. Requires API authentication and Plus Plan subscription. Returns the edited image as output. Specify desired editing operations in the request payload.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about supported operations, input format, and subscription requirements. data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding what specific account information is returned and authentication requirements.
